title: 100+ rural educators attend 5th Annual Rural Education Summit
summary_en: More than 124 educators, administrators, and policy leaders convened on April 17 at Made@Plainfield for the fifth annual Rural Education Summit, a daylong convening co-sponsored by the Purdue Center for Rural Research, Education, and Outreach and the Indiana Small and…
title_cn: [待翻译] 100+ rural educators attend 5th Annual Rural Education Summit
